title: Chattambi Paaru
subTitle: Despite coming from a family experiencing financial hardship, Parvati valiantly sets out on her own to build a life and support her family.

subTitle: Despite her warmth and courage, Charulatha yearns for love to escape her estranged father and cruel stepmother in a tumultuous household.

subTitle: Nandini, a devoted village girl, crosses paths with Surya, whose resentment toward his mother drives him to pursue a relationship with her.
